ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customer_plan_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan change */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the plan change */,
  "current_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current plan */,
  "new_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new plan */,
  "request_by" TEXT /* User who requested the plan change */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Status of the plan change (e.g., 1 - Pending, 2 - Approved, 3 - Rejected) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the plan change was created */,
  "msisdn" TEXT /* Mobile number of the customer */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the plan change was approved */,
  "rejected_date" TEXT /* Date the plan change was rejected */,
  "reason_for_rejection" TEXT /* Reason for rejecting the plan change */,
  "approval_comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by approver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_plan_changes_request_by FOREIGN KEY ("request_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_plan_changes_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_plan_changes_new_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_plan_changes_current_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the customer (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code of the customer */,
  "referred_by" INTEGER /* Customer who referred the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the plan */,
  "plan_type" TEXT /* Type of the plan (e.g., data, voice, bundle) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plan */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the plan */,
  "validity_days" INTEGER /* Validity period of the plan in days */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the plan was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the plan (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "plan_category" TEXT /* Category of the plan (e.g., individual, family) */,
  "data_limit" REAL /* Data limit of the plan in GB */,
  "voice_limit" INTEGER /* Voice limit of the plan in minutes */,
  "sms_limit" INTEGER /* SMS limit of the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., csagent, manager, admin) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "password_reset_date" TEXT /* Date the user last reset their password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "env_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment (e.g., development, testing, production) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the environment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of the environment (e.g., production, non-production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_change_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "change_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment where the action was performed */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_change_logs_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_change_logs_change_id FOREIGN KEY ("change_id") REFERENCES customer_plan_changes ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_change_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_comparison_results" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "change_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan change */,
  "current_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current plan */,
  "new_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new plan */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date the comparison was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the comparison (e.g., match, mismatch) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the comparison */,
  "comparison_description" TEXT /* Description of the comparison result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_comparison_results_new_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_comparison_results_change_id FOREIGN KEY ("change_id") REFERENCES customer_plan_changes ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_comparison_results_current_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_comparison_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_change_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of plan change (e.g., upgrade, downgrade) */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the condition (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of the condition (e.g., data-based, voice-based) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_change_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who submitted the request */,
  "current_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current plan */,
  "new_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new plan */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was submitted */,
  "request_by" TEXT /* User who submitted the request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "request_description" TEXT /* Description of the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_change_requests_current_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_change_requests_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_change_requests_new_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_change_requests_request_by FOREIGN KEY ("request_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_change_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "change_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment where the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "audit_description" TEXT /* Description of the audit entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_change_audit_change_id FOREIGN KEY ("change_id") REFERENCES customer_plan_changes ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_change_audit_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_change_audit_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_history" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of the payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the customer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan being promoted */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount offered by the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_promotions_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)
